recommendations.title: Night and Fog
recommendations.overview: Filmmaker Alain Resnais documents the atrocities behind the walls of Hitler's concentration camps.

recommendations.title: Hiroshima Mon Amour

recommendations.title: Same Old Song

recommendations.title: Stavisky...
recommendations.overview: Biarritz, 1933. Charm and talent assist small-time swindler Serge Alexandre, alias Stavisky, to bribe his way into the centre of French politics. But when his great scam involving millions is exposed, he brings the government to the verge of collapse

recommendations.title: Muriel, or the Time of Return
recommendations.overview: In the seacoast town of Boulogne, antique furniture saleswoman Hélène lives with her stepson, Bernard, who's back from military duty in Algiers. An old lover of Hélène's comes to visit, Alphonse, with his niece Françoise; he too is back from Algiers,

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: From the Land of the Moon
recommendations.overview: In 1950s France, a free-spirited woman trapped in an arranged marriage falls in love with an injured veteran of the Indochinese War.
